overview: Single independent service with no dependencies; implemented in one phase.

phases.name: Foundation Service
phases.description: Implement the standalone Hello World REST API service.

components.name: hello-api
responsibilities: Expose GET /hello returning a JSON greeting
Handle 404 and 405 errors with JSON responses
Recover from panics and return HTTP 500
components.architectureContext: Sole backend service in the system, exposed externally via Kubernetes. No upstream/downstream service dependencies.
keyConsiderations: Use net/http standard library on port 9090
Graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM with 10s timeout
responseWriter wrapper to capture status codes for logging
Ensure Content-Type: application/json on all responses
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Hello World API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Simple Hello World REST API
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:9090
paths:
  /hello:
    get:
      summary: Returns a Hello World greeting
      operationId: getHello
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful greeting response
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Greeting'
        '405':
          description: Method Not Allowed
        '500':
          description: Internal Server Error
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      operationId: getHealth
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Service healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Health'
components:
  schemas:
    Greeting:
      type: object
      properties:
        message:
          type: string
          example: Hello World
      required: [message]
    Health:
      type: object
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          example: ok
      required: [status]
